title: World Geography
description: How well do you know the world's countries, capitals, and landmarks?

questions.question: What is the capital of Australia?
questions.explanation: Canberra is the capital of Australia, often confused with Sydney which is the largest city.

questions.question: What is the longest river in the world?
questions.explanation: The Nile River in Africa is generally considered the longest river at approximately 6,650 km.

questions.question: Which country has the largest land area?
questions.explanation: Russia is the largest country by land area, covering about 17.1 million square kilometers.

questions.question: Mount Everest is located in which mountain range?
questions.explanation: Mount Everest is the highest peak in the Himalayas, on the border of Nepal and Tibet.

questions.question: What is the capital of Japan?
questions.explanation: Tokyo is the capital and largest city of Japan.

questions.question: Which ocean is the largest?
questions.explanation: The Pacific Ocean is the largest and deepest ocean, covering more than 30% of Earth's surface.

questions.question: The Amazon Rainforest is primarily located in which country?
questions.explanation: About 60% of the Amazon Rainforest is located in Brazil.

questions.question: On which continent is Egypt located?
questions.explanation: Egypt is located in the northeastern corner of Africa.
